series: Goblin Court Series 1: Receipts vs Vibes

candidates.visual_prompt: Satirical portrait trading card art, white border, readable top title plate 'GOBLIN COURT SERIES 1', readable bottom name plate 'PDF PHIL — COMPLIANCE WIZARD'. Cyber-comic Goblin Court aesthetic, neon terminal green and glitch purple palette. Character: goblin librarian with monocle, buried under 300-page PDF stack labeled 'TERMS & CONDITIONS V42'. One finger pointing to page 287 with text 'see footnote'. Background: walls of unread documents, tiny print, Ctrl+F prompt blinking '0 results'. Funny and sharp, no real public figures, no legal guilt claims, no financial safety claims.

metadata_candidate.name: PDF Phil
metadata_candidate.description: Compliance wizard of unread pages. Role: Weaponizes document length to end arguments. Flavor text: 'It's all on page 287.' Specialty: burying accountability in appendices. Counters: summary requests, TL;DR demands.

candidates.visual_prompt: Satirical portrait trading card art, white border, readable top title plate 'GOBLIN COURT SERIES 1', readable bottom name plate 'GOVERNANCE GARY — DAO DELEGATE'. Cyber-comic Goblin Court aesthetic, neon terminal green and glitch purple palette. Character: goblin in toga with 'VOTER' sash, holding rubber stamp over unread proposal stack, coffee in other hand. Background: forum threads with 'TL;DR?' comments, voting button already clicked. Funny and sharp, no real public figures, no legal guilt claims, no financial safety claims.

metadata_candidate.name: Governance Gary
metadata_candidate.description: DAO delegate who votes before reading. Role: Outsources cognition to vibes. Flavor text: 'I support the proposal in principle.' Specialty: quorum theater. Counters: mandatory quizzes, delegate scorecards.

candidates.visual_prompt: Satirical portrait trading card art, white border, readable top title plate 'GOBLIN COURT SERIES 1', readable bottom name plate 'YIELD YODA — APR MYSTIC'. Cyber-comic Goblin Court aesthetic, neon terminal green and glitch purple palette. Character: tiny robed goblin levitating above calculator with broken '=' key, holding staff topped with '%' symbol. Background: chart with infinite up-only staircase, 'math' crossed out in red. Funny and sharp, no real public figures, no legal guilt claims, no financial safety claims.

metadata_candidate.name: Yield Yoda
metadata_candidate.description: APR mystic ignoring mathematics. Role: Preaches perpetual motion finance. Flavor text: 'Number go up forever.' Specialty: conflating yield with price. Counters: unit economics, second-grade division.
